textByHash.f9701ebbe662ed852167358f45ed8f9f7e6aa666: Hello, outlander. Don't disturb the Burgher, he has many important duties to take care of.
textByHash.a425ddaee2f18fb7abee5b31468b70919c8dbe70: Ah! A fool. Excellent. The Burgher enjoys a watching a fool. Are you a fool? Ha Ha!
textByHash.f36c0ba67245169041a2323951f9a409f34bd37e: So, are you a fool? HA HA HA!
textByHash.0c54cee7c5d500a5c3ff71f0ddc8b48aa3c86c5e: Mmm? Oh yes of course. You'd better introduce yourself.
textByHash.6e7196acbbdff15b1b9b923269cf14be81c259b8: Ha, more fool you! Ha Ha Ha!
textByHash.ff4402c89973f7ce86cfd20c857a287560124110: The Burgher does not require entertainment at the moment, jester.
textByHash.8716c70fdd23e3726177522e36d53a40caa4d90b: Ho, outlander! Please introduce yourself to the Burgher.
textByHash.9edf30c53aefe1bb4296cb4f66ac409c554ad302: Hello, sir! If you need help with your tasks then you are welcome to talk to the Burgher or his advisors.
textByHash.9ef73101e73953615eaaa318f9f91c0e682713d7: Hello, ma'am! If you need help with your tasks then you are welcome to talk to the Burgher or his advisors.
